name: @vexa/bot
description: The meetings ephemeral container WORKER (P7): boots from VEXA_BOT_CONFIG (invocation.v1), joins a meeting, captures → transcribes → emits transcript.v1 + lifecycle.v1, then dies. A modular monolith behind ports — the orchestrator core is offline-provable; browser/redis/http are adapters at the composition root.

scripts.test: tsx src/config.test.ts && tsx src/orchestrator.test.ts && tsx src/signals.test.ts && tsx src/entrypoint.test.ts && tsx src/join-driver.test.ts && tsx src/stress.test.ts && tsx src/adapters/lifecycle-http.test.ts && tsx src/adapters/transcript-redis.test.ts && tsx src/adapters/acts-redis.test.ts && tsx src/pipeline.test.ts && tsx src/live-pipeline.test.ts && tsx src/recording.test.ts && tsx src/telemetry.test.ts && tsx src/replay.test.ts && tsx mock/mock.test.ts
